name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Ochtina-Rochovce Project in Europe, Slovakia dated September 2007.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Ochtina-Rochovce Project in Europe, Slovakia dated September 2007.pdf
document.description: This report details a geological evaluation of the Ochtina-Rochovce molybdenum and tungsten project in Slovakia, including resource estimates and recommendations for further exploration.
